docs.title: Soumya Shreeram
docs.text:
I am an astrophysicist and research software developer. I completed my PhD at the Max Planck Institute for Extraterrestrial Physics, where I focused on forward modelling the hot circumgalactic medium in X-rays. You can find my doctoral thesis here. Prior to this, I completed my Master's in Physics at EPFL and my Bachelor's in Physics with Astrophysics at the University of Manchester.

You can find my publications here. My science projects are summarized below.

docs.title: Science Projects
docs.text:
• Pulsars
  • Galaxies
  • Hot gas around galaxies
  • Black holes
